bio: Hossein Amir-Abdollahian served as Iran's Minister of Foreign Affairs under President Ebrahim Raisi from 2021 until his death in the helicopter crash of May 2024. A career diplomat close to the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force), he had previously served as deputy foreign minister for Arab and African affairs. He was killed alongside [President Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) when their helicopter crashed in foggy conditions in East Azerbaijan Province.
editorial_notes: Killed 19 May 2024 in same helicopter crash as President Raisi.
